mapper.select: SELECT * FROM experience WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY start_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO experience (user_id, title, company_name, location, start_date, end_date, current, description) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{companyName}, #{location}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{current}, #{description})
mapper.update: UPDATE experience SET title = #{title}, company_name = #{companyName}, location = #{location}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, current = #{current}, description = #{description} WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM experience WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
